description: Single source of truth for OfficeCLI compatibility (issue #8). Consumed by designmd_pptx.compat (doctor), CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml), packaging, and docs. When CI is bumped to pin a newer OfficeCLI, update 'recommended' and 'max_tested' here in the same change — nothing else hardcodes a version.

official.note: Official officecli/officecli agent-bridge (JSON-RPC). 'min' is the first version whose agent-bridge payload schema this project targets; 'max_tested' is the exact version CI pins.

legacy.note: iOfficeAI shape-level binary (rolling/unversioned upstream releases). Not gated by a version range — identified by --version shape and gated by the required verbs above. Set min/max_tested here if upstream adopts stable semver.
